{{Quote|I wanted something from him: his life. I got it, too. It's a pity it was just that easy.|[[Ysanne Isard]]|<ref name="X-Wing Rogue Squadron 35">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 35|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 35]]</ref>}}
'''Challer''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who sat on the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]] until [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].

==Biography==
Challer was a member of the Cabal during [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage's]] brief reign, and later was a member of the [[Tribune|Tribunal]], along with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Paltr Carvin]] and [[Plumba]]. He was [[Assassin/Legends|assassinated]] by his mistress, who tricked him into drinking [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]] [[Savareen brandy/Legends|Savareen brandy]] at the [[Imperial Hotel]] in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] as part of [[Ysanne Isard]]'s campaign to neutralize the Tribunal.
